title: Vanilla²
description: This Mod overhauls many of Minecrafts outdated system, currently its in alpha, only updating the Combat system and the enchanting table.
body:
## Vanilla²
### Updates Release in a 1-2 week cycle!
### [Bluesky](https://bsky.app/profile/painterflow11.bsky.social) | [Discord](https://discord.gg/pppHybq9xT) | [Github](https://github.com/mizius-studios/vanilla-squared)
### Changes: 
- A bunch of custom enchantments
- Double Health
- Axe rebalance
- Sword rebalance
- Armor rebalance
- Hit through plants
- Custom Enchanting Table, no more gambling! :D
- 1.8 Fishing Rod + Clip Farming for Mace
- Trident rebalance
- Enchanted books have been removed for future updates!
### Notices:
- Mobs are completely unbalanced right now, I am planning on re-balancing them all as soon as possible!
- please report anything unbalanced in pvp to us over at our discord!
<details>
<summary>Plans and Teasers</summary>

### Alpha, Beta and Release Phase
| Version | Version Number                      | Release Time                        |
| ------- | ----------------------------------- | ----------------------------------- |
| Alpha   | -2.majorVersion.minorVersion        | Current                             |
| Beta    | -1.majorVersion.minorVersion        | When all Alpha plans are finished   |
| Release | 0.majorVersion.minorVersion         | When the mod is stable and playable |

### Early Releases
Check the Github for early releases!
</details>

<details>
<summary>Incompatible Mods</summary>
  
- ViaFabricPlus
- probs some more, but I will work on mod compatibility in the beta phase!

</details>
